response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a Staff Software Engineer at Google with over 15 years of professional experience across multiple high-profile companies, making him severely overqualified for an entry-level position. His German proficiency is self-rated as 'Basic,' which directly disqualifies him from a role that explicitly requires strong verbal and written German communication. While Java appears in his skills list and he has some historical Java use at Altom Consulting, his primary and recent stack is TypeScript/Node.js with no Java-centric project work and no exposure to the insurance sector.
strengths: CS degree from University of Bucharest satisfies the academic requirement
Demonstrated agile practice experience (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing) across multiple roles
Java listed as a skill with some historical usage in robotics and tooling work at Altom Consulting
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff Engineer at Google with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level role raises retention and fit concerns
German proficiency is 'Basic,' directly failing the job's explicit requirement for strong German communication
No insurance sector experience and no recent Java project work; primary expertise is TypeScript/Node.js
